selector-class-pattern.message: Class names must be in kebab-case (lowercase letters/numbers with at least one hyphen), except a small allow-list of legacy names like .header, .wrapper, .board, .cell, .revealed, .mine, and .exploded.

selector-id-pattern.message: ID selectors must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (e.g. #root, #main-content).
